3 PVC Pass Throughs

10 Broad Jumps

3 Snatch Pull

3 Full Snatch
5 OH Squat

hypertrophy.reasoning: OHS and power snatch heavily tax quads, glutes, and anterior shoulders; posterior chain work aids recovery.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Overhead Squat, 3 by 2 at 90 percent. Strength: Power Snatch, 1 by 2. Metcon: For Time: 21-15-9 OHS @ 45/30, 150m Run. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
